name: bili-webos-tv
description: Bilibili client for LG webOS TV

scripts.package: tsc -p tsconfig.service.json && vite build && cp -r webos/meta/* dist/ && cd dist && ares-package .
scripts.package:release: tsc -p tsconfig.service.json && vite build && cp -r webos/meta/* dist/ && cd dist && ares-package --no-minify . ../webos/service/com.biliwebos.app.service
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.tools.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.service.json --noEmit
scripts.test: BUN_BIN=${BUN_BIN:-$HOME/.bun/bin/bun}; tsc -p tsconfig.service.json && "$BUN_BIN" test webos/service/com.biliwebos.app.service/test/*.test.ts src/*.test.ts src/**/*.test.ts tools/**/*.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage: BUN_BIN=${BUN_BIN:-$HOME/.bun/bin/bun}; tsc -p tsconfig.service.json && "$BUN_BIN" test --preload ./tools/coverage-preload.ts --coverage --coverage-reporter=text --coverage-reporter=lcov --coverage-dir=coverage webos/service/com.biliwebos.app.service/test/*.test.ts src/*.test.ts src/**/*.test.ts tools/**/*.test.ts
